name: Wallet Intelligence Meta-Aggregator MCP
description: Pay-per-call x402 META-aggregator: composes 7 EVM wallet-intelligence services in parallel into one wallet dossier (labels, portfolio risk, DeFi health, MEV exposure, approvals risk, CEX flows, funding trace). Single endpoint, fail-soft per axis. Pay USDC on Base — no signup, no API key.

authentication.credentials: Pay-per-call via x402 USDC on Base — no signup, no API key. Each call returns 402 with an EXACT-scheme requirement; agents pay 0x1664530DC2A1CA350B1dbaD1Fc1F1a70c90fe4de in Base USDC and retry with X-PAYMENT.

skills.name: EVM Wallet Dossier (7-axis fan-out)
skills.description: Composite wallet dossier — fan-out to 7 wallet-intelligence services in parallel: labels, portfolio_risk, defi_health, mev_exposure, approvals_risk, cex_flows, funding_trace. Per-axis source_url + ok + latency_ms. Fail-soft. $0.75/call.
examples: Build a full intelligence dossier for 0xd8dA6BF26964aF9D7eEd9e03E53415D37aA96045 across ethereum + base
Run all 7 wallet-intel axes against this address in one call
Compose labels + portfolio risk + DeFi health + MEV + approvals + CEX flows + funding trace for a wallet

skills.name: EVM Wallet Dossier Summary (plain-English)
skills.description: Plain-English 2-paragraph summary derived from the 7 dossier axes. Triage-friendly, chat-agent-ready. Same fan-out, lighter return shape. $0.50/call.
examples: Give me a one-paragraph wallet intelligence summary for vitalik.eth
Quick-triage 0xabc... — what's the risk profile in plain English?
Summarize this wallet's posture across labels, risk, MEV, approvals, CEX, funding
